prompt:
A neatly arranged two-servo arm kit laid out on a clean work surface: laser-cut linkage pieces, a small gripper plate, screws, standoffs, and servo horns organized in a tidy grid. Two micro servos sit at the top of the layout, and a small assembly diagram is present only as faint, unreadable line art, conveying “kit of parts” rather than a fully assembled arm.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image in a grounded near-future workshop aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, crisp detail on small hardware, no brand logos, and no readable text. The composition should be clean and icon-friendly, emphasizing the completeness of the kit and the two-servo focus.
